goal: Update 'gad graph build' help text to reflect post-D3 data sources. Today help says 'Generate graph.json + graph.html from .planning/ XML files' but the underlying task-registry-reader.cjs prefers per-task JSON under .planning/tasks/<id>.json since decision 2026-04-20 D3 (task 63-11). Help text is stale. TASK-REGISTRY.xml is legacy fallback, slated for retirement per 63-53.' Small but removes operator-facing confusion about what sources are current.
